nodes.label: AI as research and synthesis tool
nodes.label_negative: Manual web research with declining quality
nodes.grounding_span: Performing the same task with AI allows the agent to perform the research, sourcing and synthesis for me

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I still don't trust it overall - yet - and am only comfortable when I have sufficient knowledge to interrogate the results

nodes.label: AI for creative and strategic work
nodes.grounding_span: I actively enjoy the product design and research process, and especially the nitty gritty of web layout

nodes.label: AI in customer service for small business
nodes.grounding_span: I'm in two minds about agentic customer service

nodes.label: AI for routine compliance and accounting tasks
nodes.label_negative: Manual handling of compliance and accounting
nodes.grounding_span: an AI agent that could actively engage in performing routine accounting, tax, and compliance tasks would improve my life considerably

nodes.label: Efficiency and reduced burden
nodes.grounding_span: it becomes more and more burdensome to run a small business

nodes.label: Epistemic confidence and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I exhaustively research everything before it reaches a production system

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and personal enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: this is the satisfaction of creating products for customers

nodes.label: Personalised customer relationships
nodes.grounding_span: the personalised business relationship is a small business's USP

nodes.label: Positive adoption of AI for research and synthesis
nodes.grounding_span: It's becoming a natural workflow, and more enjoyable than manual web research

nodes.label: Conditional trust in AI results
nodes.grounding_span: I still don't trust it overall - yet - and am only comfortable when I have sufficient knowledge to interrogate the results

nodes.label: Preference for human creativity in product design
nodes.grounding_span: I don't necessarily see AI as a source of the unique inspiration required to build a successful product from scratch

nodes.label: Mixed feelings about AI in customer service
nodes.grounding_span: I'm in two minds about agentic customer service

nodes.label: Desire for AI to handle routine compliance tasks
nodes.grounding_span: an AI agent that could actively engage in performing routine accounting, tax, and compliance tasks would improve my life considerably

nodes.label: Experience-driven instinctual evaluation
nodes.grounding_span: Pure instinct based on experience. I've worked in tech or tech-adjacent roles for 20 years

nodes.label: Strategic positioning toward human-dependent work
nodes.grounding_span: Any future business or product venture will require a decidedly analogue component - with physical dependency on objects and humans
